news.t: These ETFs Already Own Anthropic and OpenAI
Why ETF investors are shaking off tech-stock turbulence and AI bubble fears
Hot tech stock ETFs, from AI to quantum computing, have made investors lots of money. Is it time to sell?
AI's growth is just getting started, BlackRock's thematic ETF head says
Ways to target – or avoid — Big Tech and megacap stocks via ETFs amid AI frenzy
BlackRock Broadens Access to Global AI and Technology Growth Opportunities Through Two New Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: BAI is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 7.87%, Micron Technology at 6.18%, Advanced Micro Devices at 4.69%, Lam Research at 4.64%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.24%.

overview.description: The iShares A.I. Innovation and Tech Active ETF (BAI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of global AI and technology equities across all market capitalizations. Holdings are selected using proprietary, fundamental research. BAI was launched on Oct 21, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
